text: I feel a sense of quiet contemplation in the first space—its minimalism invites reflection and perhaps a tiny bit of unease, as emptiness often does. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and stimulating displays about research and development, I sense curiosity awakening within me. Here, I find myself energized by the prospect of innovation and the dynamic interplay between human creativity and technology. My mood shifts from introspective to inspired, carried by the vibrant energy of inquiry.
